notes: Anti-TNF SC autoimmune; often with MTX
Anti-CD52; depletes T/B cells → low ADA capacity after dosing
Anti-PDL1 IV oncology; checkpoint → T-cell dysfunction
Anti-C.diff toxin B; single IV infusion
Anti-TNF SC; PEGylated Fab; low immunogenicity generally
Anti-RANKL SC bone; rare ADA (tolerance to self-antigen)
Anti-APP/Aβ IV AD; aggressive dosing schedule
Anti-CGRP SC migraine; low ADA despite SC
Anti-CD20 SC MS (newer SC form); B-cell depleting
Anti-IgE SC atopic; possible tolerance (target is self-protein IgE)
Anti-EGFR IV CRC; fully human low ADA
Anti-VEGF intravitreal Fab; minimal systemic exposure
Anti-IL6R IV RA/CRS (IV main; SC also available)
Anti-IL12/23 SC psoriasis/PsA/CD; IV induction then SC
